The '''Corps Commander''' was a variant of Xim's [[war-robot]]s. The Corps Commanders were designed with greater independence than their counterparts and could be distinguished by a golden death-head emblem on their breastplates in contrast to the white born by standard models. They saw action during the [[Xim Wars]]. Despite being outdated by modern era standards, they were still deadly opponents in combat. [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] encountered a Corps Commander during his treasure hunt on the planet [[Dellalt/Legends|Dellalt]].
